title: The State Update Flow in a React Component
description: This flowchart illustrates the process of updating component state, triggering a re-render, and the resulting UI change in a typical React application.
elements: Event Trigger (e.g., user clicks a button)
UI Updated to Reflect New State
relationships: The Initial State is the starting point
An Event Trigger calls the State Update Function
The State Update Function triggers a Re-render
The Re-render initiates the Virtual DOM Reconciliation process
Reconciliation results in the UI being Updated
